commit_scope: Tests for Spec 109: Open Responses Interoperability Layer

local_validation.details: Test file verified against spec 109. Tests cover: normalize_open_responses_model() prefix stripping, build_normalized_response_call() envelope construction, task creation with route_decision context, executor interoperability, completion tracking with open_responses_v1 schema, GET /api/agent/tasks/{task_id} exposes route_decision, error handling, and NormalizedResponseCall Pydantic model enforcement.

ci_validation.details: Test-only PR: adds test file covering Spec 109 acceptance criteria. No runtime code changed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Test suite verifies Open Responses v1 normalization layer: executor prefix stripping (cursor/, codex/, gemini/), normalized response call envelope construction, task context embedding, cross-executor input structure parity, and schema contract enforcement via Pydantic model.
test_flows: cursor and codex produce identical input structure
error handling returns correct HTTP status codes
NormalizedResponseCall Pydantic model enforces schema contract
